strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role at re:cinq
Founded and maintains an event-driven open source platform (GISCollective) demonstrating long-term ownership
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership: title is Senior/Staff IC, no CTO, VP, or Head-of-Engineering role, and no track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems experience — only ~14 months of light AI-tooling exposure at re:cinq, far short of the hard requirement
Zero fintech infrastructure background: no credit risk, working-capital, trade decisioning, or regulated-finance production experience (RIDE Capital role was generic Node/GraphQL work)

key_factors.factor: No executive or people-leadership track record
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience

response.justification: The candidate is an experienced individual-contributor software craftsman, but the role demands an executive technologist with production multi-agent AI systems, deep fintech and regulated-environment experience, and a proven record scaling engineering organizations to 30+ — none of which the resume substantiates. Current AI exposure is limited to roughly a year of MCP/agent tooling work as an IC, fintech exposure is tangential and non-architectural, and there is no evidence of senior leadership layers built, board-level communication, or hybrid-delivery governance. Against the stated hard requirements, this is a weak fit.
